name: Rolling of the Arm
starting_position: Open Position, Right to Left hand hold
ending_position: Open Position, R to L hand hold
preceding_figure_names: American Spin, Catapult, Change of Places Left to Right, Chugging, Rolling Off the Arm
following_figure_names: Change of Hands Behind Back, Change of Places Left to Right, Rolling Off the Arm, Windmill, Spanish Arms, American Spin, Miami Special, Shoulder Spin, Chugging, Catapult
notes:
Double hand hold:
Turn lady under raised L arm over step 3 and 4, lowering arm to waist level in front of bodies on step 5, releasing L to R hand hold at end of step 7.
Right to Right hand hold - get to this hand hold at end of previous figure
Spin ending when danced with R to R hand hold:
Man: At end of 7, raise R hand above Lady's R shoulder and circle it quickly in a clockwise direction. Over steps 8-10, continue to circle R hand clockwise, then lower arm to lead lady back at the end of her turn.
Lady: Spin approx. 1 1/8 to R on RF underarm towards end of step 7. 8-10 side and slightly back to chasse LRL, turning 1/2 to R to end LF back in Open Position.

comments: Ends LF side slightly forward in RSP
Option to place RF behind LF (Cuban Cross) on step 6

steps.action: fwd chasse RLR, end in Open Position
comments: Continue to circle R hand clockwise

steps.action: extend arm to open position, lead lady back
comments: Additional turn 1/8 to R over steps 8-10
